# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Use `agents.md` as the repo-level default context.

When looking for portable AI assets in this repository:

- canonical source:
  - `.ai/assets/`
- human-facing guides:
  - `.dev/guides/ai-collaboration-guides/`
- Copilot prompt wrappers:
  - `.github/prompts/`

Prefer wrappers in `.github/prompts/` as entry points, and follow them back to `.ai/assets/` for canonical definitions.
